title: Farmicraft
description: Love being the farmer on all your friends SMP,well welcome to Farmicraft,enjoy planting and farming to your fullest
body:
# Welcome to Farmicraft

________________________________________________________________________________________________
Are you always the farmer or the bringer of food on every SMP,well this is the modpack for you.With more than 90 new food and crops,this will surely reach that itch to yeild in the feilds.

Forget the mobs,wall them off and live your dream farming away,perfect for late night plays jsut to relax without any interuption or other pressing stuff to do in game.Easy to jsut play maybe listen to a podcast at the same time,some random person yap on YT or just enjoy the quiet.
________________________________________________________________________________________________

Added stuff

- Way more seed types
- New fruit trees
- food baskets
- knifes / cutting boards
- stove / pans / pots

Main mods

```
- Farmers delight
- croptopia refabricated
- Natures delight and spirit
- Fabric seasons and dependancies
- Natures compass
- All Yungs mods
- all TXNi mods (sodium,litium ....etc)
```


________________________________________________________________________________________________
